title: An Ordinance Adopting the Revised Joint Memorandun Circular No. 01 Series of 2021 Dated June 11, 2021 Titled "revising and Expanding Joint Memorandun Circular No. 01 S. 2020 or the Streamlined Guidelines for the Issuance of Permits Licenses and Certificates Fot the Construction of Shared Passive Telecommunications Tower Infrastructure (pttis)" in the Municipality of Los Baños.
